name: Data & Database Engineering
student_summary: Build the pipelines and databases that move and store the world's data.
overview: Build the pipelines and databases that move and store the world's data. Data & Database Engineering sits in the Data & AI family of Technology & Computing. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You enjoy breaking problems into parts and reasoning them through
You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply data modelling to real problems
Collaborate with your team using etl pipelines
Keep improving at sql optimization — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Office or fully remote — laptop work with flexible location
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
Strong earning ceiling (₹55 LPA+ at senior levels)
A broad Data & AI foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Data & Database Engineering is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of etl pipelines
projects: Beginner: explore data modelling with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using SQL
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Data & Artificial Intelligence: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Cloud & Infrastructure: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Software Engineering: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Data & Database Engineering pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹55 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Computer Science, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Tech CSE/IT, BCA. Alternatives exist: bootcamps + a strong project portfolio.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Data & Database Engineering evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Data & Database Engineering is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
